subject: fix(web): complete hydration mismatch cleanup and theme deduplication
body:
Extends the initial #418 fix with thorough cleanup across all affected files:

- usePWAUpdate: useState initializers used module-level _hasUpdate/_offlineReady
  which are set by async browser APIs. Changed to explicit false defaults.
- DebugPill: useState initialized from debugGetEntries()/debugGetCounts() which
  read module-level entries populated by global error listeners at import time.
  Changed to empty defaults, synced on mount in useEffect. EnvTab called
  debugGetEnvironment() (navigator, matchMedia, location) during render — moved
  to useEffect.
- useTheme: 29 components call useTheme(), each running Uniwind.setTheme() +
  debug logging on mount. Added _lastAppliedTheme module-level guard so theme
  application only fires once per actual theme change (was 12x on boot).
- Updated AI_MISTAKES.md with permanent hydration rules
- Updated HISTORY.md and SESSION_NOTES.md

Tags: hydration, pwa, debug, theme, cleanup
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 3
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: pwa
Semver: patch

https://claude.ai/code/session_01MQNjzz5kPEg68WcyZKFnp7
title: complete hydration mismatch cleanup and theme deduplication
